title: bacopa reflexa
intro: Bacopa reflexa is a species of plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as the water hyssop or bacopa. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its adaptogenic and nootropic effects. The plant is believed to promote cognitive function, memory, and mental clarity, as well as provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits. Bacopa reflexa is often prepared as a herbal tea or supplement, and its extracts are used to support brain health and overall well-being.
